title: Creamy Halloumi Jacket with Pickled Chilli Honey & Fennel Salad
summary: A banger baked potato stuffed with your Creamy Cauli & Halloumi Curry batch, topped with sweet-spicy chilli honey, and served with a crisp, zippy fennel salad. What a glow-up.

ingredients.label: 1 tbsp white wine vinegar or lemon juice
ingredients.name: White Wine Vinegar

method.description: Before you begin, make the Creamy Cauli & Halloumi Curry batch recipe.
Prick the potatoes all over with a fork, rub with a little olive oil and a good pinch of salt, then bake for 50 mins until the skins are super crisp and the insides fluffy.
Thinly slice the red chilli and add it to a small bowl with the white wine vinegar and a pinch of salt. Give it a mix and set aside to lightly pickle.
Reheat your curry leftovers in a pan or microwave until just spoonable, loosen with a splash of water if needed.
Warm the honey in a small frying pan. Add the pickled chilli slices and a small splash of the pickling liquor. Let it bubble for 30 seconds, then set aside.
Finely slice the fennel and toss it in a bowl with the rocket, a squeeze of lemon juice and a drizzle of olive oil. Season with salt and pepper.
Slice open the baked potatoes and fluff up the insides with a fork. Spoon over the warm Creamy Cauli & Halloumi Curry, then drizzle with the warm chilli honey. Serve alongside the fennel salad.

chefs.name: Jodie Nixon
chefs.summary: Jodie is a recipe writer, Mob food producer, and professional snacker. When she's not recreating all your childhood classics, she's creating delicious veg-forward dishes that'll prove you don't always need meat to have a good time. She's one hell of a talented cook.
